      ✉️ Email Templates 4 ▼
      New Introduction Open in Gmail
      Hi [Name], I came across your work on [topic] and wanted to introduce myself. I am a finance professional transitioning into AI and technology, with a focus on responsible AI adoption and enablement. At Fitch Ratings, I led a Salesforce adoption that reached 95% in 3 months across 122 people using ADKAR methodology. I am now building toward roles in AI Product Management and AI Enablement. Would love to connect and learn more about [their work/company]. With appreciation, Bianca Kugblenu
      Warm Follow-Up Open in Gmail
      Hi [Name], It was so good to connect with you [at event/via person]. I have been thinking about [specific thing they said] and it really resonated. I wanted to follow up on [specific topic]. [One sentence about what you can offer or what you are curious about.] Would love to keep the conversation going. Warmly, Bianca
      Info Interview Request Open in Gmail
      Hi [Name], I am Bianca Kugblenu, a finance professional making a deliberate transition into AI and technology. [Mutual connection] suggested I reach out. Your work in [their area] is exactly the direction I am building toward. I bring a background in change management, L&D, and structured adoption from Fitch Ratings and Morgan Stanley. Would you have 20 minutes for a conversation? I am flexible on timing. With appreciation, Bianca Kugblenu biancakugblenu@gmail.com
      Thank You After Meeting Open in Gmail
      Hi [Name], Thank you for taking the time to speak with me [yesterday/today/on date]. [One specific thing that stood out.] I am going to [specific next step you committed to]. If there is ever anything I can help with, please do not hesitate to reach out. With appreciation, Bianca

      🔬
      Truth Be Told
      Money, health, race, power, work, technology. Both sides. Credible sources. No spin.
      🔍
      No algorithm. No personalization. Stories from left, right, center, and global sources, shuffled randomly. Bias labels on every story so you see the lens, not just the headline. Say "refresh my feed" in Cowork to pull today's stories.
      Last refreshed: March 20, 2026 | Sources: 12 outlets across 6 regions
